title: Discussion with Cerberus - Startup code Boot time

items: BM < 3ms (Just jump to application without Reset)
Total time to enter APP main would be ~ 20ms

content.title: LBIST execution
content.content: Currently LBIST is executed in APP startup code. But better to do this in IFX Firmware itself which will reduce startup code timing by few ms (~ 3-4 ms)

content.text: First CAN message in EVAL board

items: Cerberus able to send first message in ~40ms after main
Master - Slave synchronization will not have a big delay because slave core startup time is <2ms

content.text: Boot time framework in Startup code

items: Cerberus Startup doesn't support this framework. Project team needs to measure on their own with debug environment.
There is a project callout for each core when startup code is started in Application (Startup_Core0_Callout, Startup_Core1_Callout, Startup_Core2_Callout)
Project can use this callout for any measurement
